video_info.title: UEFA Europa League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Lille takes on Aston Villa in this UEFA Europa League Round of 16 first leg clash as in‑form Olivier Giroud and Hákon Haraldsson lead Lille’s charge at Stade Pierre‑Mauroy. Unai Emery's Aston Villa will rely on their standout performers, Morgan Rogers and Emiliano Buendía, if they are to travel back with an advantage away from home in this tightly balanced knockout clash. Which side will gain the upper hand? Find out as we bring you all the action from the UEFA Europa League 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA Europa League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Bologna takes on AS Roma in this UEFA Europa League Round of 16 first‑leg clash as Thijs Dallinga and Federico Bernardeschi lead Bologna’s charge at the Stadio Renato Dall’Ara. Gian Piero Gasperini’s Roma will look toward their standout performers, Donyell Malen and Bryan Zaragoza, to take a crucial advantage back to the capital in what promises to be a fiercely contested knockout battle. Which side will gain the upper hand? Find out as we bring you all the action from the UEFA Europa League 2025‑26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
